name: IRC_MEDIA_ASSETS_VL
query: SELECT B.MEDIA_ASSET_ID MEDIA_ASSET_ID, B.MEDIA_ASSET_GUID MEDIA_ASSET_GUID, TL.MEDIA_ASSET_NAME MEDIA_ASSET_NAME, B.MEDIA_ASSET_STATUS MEDIA_ASSET_STATUS, B.CONTEXT CONTEXT, B.LINKED_ASSET_ID LINKED_ASSET_ID, B.OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER, B.CREATED_BY CREATED_BY, B.CREATION_DATE CREATION_DATE, B.LAST_UPDATED_BY LAST_UPDATED_BY, B.LAST_UPDATE_DATE LAST_UPDATE_DATE, B.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN FROM IRC_MEDIA_ASSETS_B B, IRC_MEDIA_ASSETS_TL TL WHERE B.MEDIA_ASSET_ID = TL.MEDIA_ASSET_ID AND TL.LANGUAGE = USERENV('LANG')
